title: wv_protected_lands
description: West Virginia protected lands including state parks, forests, wildlife areas, and national lands.
abstract:
The types of lands included in this map service are: 
- Local land: Local Lands / TNC Nature Preserves
- State Lands: Wildlife Management Areas / State Forests / State Parks
- National Lands: National Forest / National Park Service Lands / National Wilflife Refuges
